name: 寒冰坚忍
description: 为自身施加「寒冰坚忍」buff，持续2回合：受到的所有伤害降低50%，任何攻击阿尔萨斯的棋子被冰冻1回合
code: function executeSkill(context) { var caster = context.piece; var alreadyIcebound = caster.statusTags && caster.statusTags.some(function(t) { return t.type === 'icebound-fortitude'; }); if (alreadyIcebound) return { success: false, message: '寒冰坚忍已激活中' }; addStatusEffectById(caster.instanceId, { id: 'icebound-fortitude-' + caster.instanceId, name: '寒冰坚忍', type: 'icebound-fortitude', currentDuration: 2, currentUses: -1, intensity: 1, stacks: 1, relatedRules: ['rule-arthas-icebound'] }); addRuleById(caster.instanceId, 'rule-arthas-icebound'); return { success: true, message: caster.name + '激活了寒冰坚忍！持续2回合：受到伤害降低50%，攻击者将被冰冻1回合！' }; }
previewCode: function calculatePreview(piece, skillDef) { return { description: '为自身施加寒冰坚忍（2回合）：受伤害降低50%，攻击者被冰冻1回合', expectedValues: { duration: 2 } }; }
